title: Fall Fundraiser 2024 – Thank You!
summary: Nine days, 65 gongs, 27 meals, five banjos, and one dinosaur invasion later, our 2024 Fall Fundraiser is finally at its end. With your help, we raised over $600,000! Whether you were answering phones, drumming up support on the air, keeping us fueled, or just getting a new mug or poster – thank you for making this year’s Fall Fundraiser a rousing success and a roaring good time! The love from our community is what keeps us going strong, and we appreciate each and every one of you for your su...
